name: codex-loop-engineering
description: Artifact-first loop orchestration workflows for substantial Codex projects.

interface.shortDescription: Run disciplined planning, execution, review, and repair loops in Codex
interface.longDescription: Codex Loop Engineering helps Codex handle substantial projects with route tiers, artifact-first handoffs, independent review, arbitration, repair loops, and explicit stop conditions. It is designed for long-running coding, research, product, content, and workflow projects where a single-pass plan is not enough.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Loop Engineering for this project.
Plan a multi-agent Codex loop for this work.
Review this loop artifact and arbitrate findings.
